name: Whole Wheat & Oak Bran Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the first five ingredients (eggs, oil, buttermilk, brown sugar, and molasses) until blended.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients (whole wheat flour, flour, oat bran flakes, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, dates, and walnuts).
3. Add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and beat until blended. Do not overbeat.
4. Divide the batter evenly among five greased mini-loaf pans (6x3x2-inches).
5. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for about 45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the loaves to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing them and continuing to cool on a rack.
7. Yields: 5 mini-loaves.
Note: Oat bran can be purchased at most supermarkets or health food stores. It is available as "milled" or "stone-ground." The milled version has a finer texture, while the stone-ground version will produce a slightly coarser crumb, adding a bit of character to this country-style loaf.
